list.name: profile_id
list.label: profile_id
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM v05_reconciliation_measurement_day ORDER BY profile_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM v05_reconciliation_measurement_day ORDER BY profile_id

list.name: scenario_name
list.label: scenario
list.definition: SELECT '.*' AS scenario_name UNION SELECT DISTINCT scenario_name FROM unified_reliability_score_day_v05 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' ORDER BY scenario_name
list.query: SELECT '.*' AS scenario_name UNION SELECT DISTINCT scenario_name FROM unified_reliability_score_day_v05 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' ORDER BY scenario_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_id,profile_id,dt_from,dt_to,processing_mode,runtime_mode,scenario_mode,source_mode,exogenous_mode,created_at FROM pipeline_run_registry WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt_from) ORDER BY run_id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT source_gen_run_id,profile_id,target_date,scenario_name,scenario_id,source_generation_scenario,scenario_family,status,started_at,ended_at FROM source_generation_run WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') ORDER BY source_gen_run_id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT b.target_date,b.scenario_name,b.run_id,b.source_gen_run_id,COUNT(*) behavior_count,COALESCE(t.transaction_count,0) transaction_count,COALESCE(s.state_count,0) state_count FROM canonical_behavior_events b LEFT JOIN (SELECT profile_id,target_date,scenario_name,run_id,source_gen_run_id,COUNT(*) transaction_count FROM canonical_transaction_events GROUP BY profile_id,target_date,scenario_name,run_id,source_gen_run_id) t ON t.profile_id=b.profile_id AND t.target_date=b.target_date AND t.scenario_name=b.scenario_name AND t.run_id=b.run_id AND t.source_gen_run_id=b.source_gen_run_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT profile_id,target_date,scenario_name,run_id,source_gen_run_id,COUNT(*) state_count FROM canonical_state_events GROUP BY profile_id,target_date,scenario_name,run_id,source_gen_run_id) s ON s.profile_id=b.profile_id AND s.target_date=b.target_date AND s.scenario_name=b.scenario_name AND s.run_id=b.run_id AND s.source_gen_run_id=b.source_gen_run_id WHERE b.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(b.target_date) AND ('${scenario_name}'='.*' OR b.scenario_name REGEXP '${scenario_name}') GROUP BY b.target_date,b.scenario_name,b.run_id,b.source_gen_run_id,t.transaction_count,s.state_count ORDER BY b.target_date DESC,b.run_id DESC LIMIT 100
